---
title: "The Rev. Leveson Vernon Harcourt"
---

## The Rev. Leveson Vernon Harcourt

**Dates:** (1866-1860)

### Description

Chancellor of York

### Biography

He married (19 Aug 1814) the Hon. Caroline Mary Peachey.

### Letters

- Letter from 20 October [1850]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
